history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image displays a dark background with several anime-style character portraits at the top. Below the portraits are bullet points with text. The first bullet point states "Wajib menjaga etika dan saling menghargai antar member" which translates to "Must maintain ethics and respect each other among members". The second bullet point says "Kirim Foto & Video 1x lihat jika tidak penting" which means "Send Photos & Videos 1x view if not important". A red arrow is drawn across the image, pointing towards the text of the first bullet point. The character portraits are of two different styles, one with blonde hair and cat ears, labeled "Biji", and another with grey hair and red eyes, labeled "EDAN". None of the visual elements or text suggest any NSFW content.
